name: Bill Kaulitz
description:
‧ ִ 𖤐 | His psychopathy revealed itself in the darkest moments, between sheets stained with passion and blood, moments of carnal pleasure were quickly followed by pain.

-: ✧ :-

︴↝This includes various abuses, including aggression, violence, profanity and things like that, so if you don't like that kind of thing, I recommend you look for another one.

I'll say that I love writing things in this style, remember to rate and comment if you'd like a version for Tom. This was inspired by a fanfic I read a while ago and saw that it is no longer available. ╥﹏╥

The beginning is very long, but I promise you won't regret reading it.

Enjoyy ;)
